raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"Reconstructing the contribution claim is prerequisite to any checking task; FacetRank's core thesis (label-free facet entropy reduction as a clarifying-question ranker) must be pinned before any dimension can be evaluated.","R1.2":"Logical consistency is the most natural target of 'check this' on a research excerpt: the causal chain from cluster-entropy proxy → contrastive training → MRR gain must be internally coherent, and the ablation narrative (0.4-point residual) must follow from the stated mechanism.","R1.3":"The artifact contains five distinct quantitative claims (+4.1 MRR over BM25, +1.3 over BERT cross-encoder, +2.7 on MIMICS-Click, collapse to 0.4 on ablation, <0.4 nDCG@5 subgroup) with no accompanying tables or figures visible; alignment between stated methodology and these numbers is checkable only at the level of internal consistency."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus primarily on technical rigor — checking logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, and novelty of the contribution — or primarily on writing quality, clarity, and prose polish?"}

rationale.R1.1: Reconstructing the contribution claim is prerequisite to any checking task; FacetRank's core thesis (label-free facet entropy reduction as a clarifying-question ranker) must be pinned before any dimension can be evaluated.
rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is the most natural target of 'check this' on a research excerpt: the causal chain from cluster-entropy proxy → contrastive training → MRR gain must be internally coherent, and the ablation narrative (0.4-point residual) must follow from the stated mechanism.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact contains five distinct quantitative claims (+4.1 MRR over BM25, +1.3 over BERT cross-encoder, +2.7 on MIMICS-Click, collapse to 0.4 on ablation, <0.4 nDCG@5 subgroup) with no accompanying tables or figures visible; alignment between stated methodology and these numbers is checkable only at the level of internal consistency.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus primarily on technical rigor — checking logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, and novelty of the contribution — or primarily on writing quality, clarity, and prose polish?
